Video.summary: NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs University of Utah in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

Image.alt: NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah
NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah
NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Video.summary: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Video.summary: Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn go up against Eva Welsher and Angela Simon in the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinals.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2

Video.summary: Catch all the action from the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal 1 at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships held in Naples, Florida. This semifinal match features top senior pros Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy facing Jennifer Dawson and Bonnie Williams in a high-stakes contest. Expert commentary highlights key strategies, player strengths, and match dynamics including powerful serves from Ava Welsher, tactical lobs, and intense court positioning. Follow how the players adjust to crowd pressure and timeouts in this best-of-three game format. Get ready for a thrilling showdown in one of pickleball’s premier senior pro events.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Video.summary: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League returns for an explosive Season 2 at the iconic Jio World Garden in BKC, Mumbai. The season opener features a high-stakes rematch of last year's final: the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans, owned by cinematic powerhouse Atlee and Priya Atlee, take on the formidable Pune United, led by owner Riteish Deshmukh. Witness world-class athletes from 18 countries compete in a series of intense Men’s Singles, Women’s Doubles, and Mixed Doubles matches. With the pressure of a "Davis Cup" atmosphere and the precision of tactical "kitchen" play, both teams battle for every point to establish early dominance in India’s premier pickleball league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: Experience the electric atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the high-stakes battle for the top four intensifies between the Hyderabad Superstars and Delhi Dilwale. With legendary co-owner Sunil Gavaskar watching from the sidelines, the Dilwale look to maintain their winning streak against a fiercely aggressive Hyderabad squad known for their wild celebrations and relentless energy. This tie features a series of high-octane clashes, from the strategic precision of Shawn Mendes and Alejandra Lopez in women’s singles to the "grueling" 15-minute sprints of elite doubles play. As the "Band of Honor" leaderboard hangs in the balance, every rally becomes a desperate fight for survival in one of the world's most prestigious pickleball arenas.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Delhi - Day 6 Tie 1

Video.summary: YouTuber Danny Duncan teams up with Pickleball pro Anna Leigh Waters in a match against Pickleball pro Leigh Waters & teammate, former NFL quarterback Connor Shaw.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2

Video.summary: Freddie Powell and Louis Laville take on Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert in this critical Men’s Doubles Semifinal from the 2023 English Nationals. With a spot in the championship round on the line, both teams bring their A-game—mixing sharp shot selection, strategic court positioning, and high-pressure execution. Watch as these top British players battle through tight rallies and momentum swings in a must-see semifinal clash.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: The Arizona Pickleball League is created -- 5 teams in the league, 4 teams make the playoffs, 1 will not. Meet Kyle Koszuta of the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: S01E01 - The Start

Image.alt: S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start

Video.summary: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Pickleball star JW Johnson & pro football player Marcellus Wiley team up against pro-pickler Jorja Johnson & film director and producer John Brenkus.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2

Video.summary: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.
Video.title: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Image.alt: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
